name: Browned-Butter Protein Cookies (Toffee + Chocolate Chip)
description: FIRST DRAFT (to tune): the toffee + chocolate-chip flavor of the canonical 60 g browned-butter protein cookie - same browned-butter dough, 330F/check-at-10 bake and optional pan-slap, with toffee bits folded in alongside the chips for crisp caramel pockets. Toffee adds sugar+fat, so we'll dial the amount (and maybe the protein load) for macros next.

payload.text: Calorie-swap, not an add-on: this trades half the chocolate chips for toffee bits (5 g + 5 g) so the cookie stays at the plain 60 g cookie's calorie level - chips and toffee are ~5 cal/g, so it's near 1:1 by weight. Shift the split toward more chocolate or more toffee to taste. Toffee melts to crisp caramel pockets - press a few on top so they stay visible.

payload.instructionText: Add dry: stir in the whey, flour, pudding mix, baking soda, and salt until a thick, scoopable dough forms, then fold in the chocolate chips and toffee bits. It should hold its shape, not pour. Too stiff/dry -> a splash of milk; too loose -> a bit more flour. Taste for sweetness.
